prompt:
あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Message to customers (顧客へのメッセージ)
【Industry】: Telecommunications (通信業)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: inference, intended_audience, intended_audience
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=B, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Customer Support Representative",
      "role": "Company spokesperson",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Hello, this is Maya Chen from RiverCity Mobile. I’m calling to let you know about a planned network upgrade in the downtown area this Friday between 1 and 3 a.m. During that window, some customers may notice slower data speeds or brief drops in service. To prepare, please restart your phone before bed and make sure our free MyRiverCity app is updated, so you can receive real-time alerts and check the outage map. If you rely on your phone for alarms, consider using a backup alarm device that night. Most upgrades finish quickly, and your service should return to normal right after the work is done. If you experience issues after 3 a.m., contact us through the app or call 611, and we will assist you right away.",
    "topic": "Planned network upgrade and temporary service interruption notice"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "Why is the upgrade scheduled between 1 and 3 a.m.?",
      "options": [
        "To reduce the impact on customers’ usage",
        "To match regular office hours",
        "Because the weather is always better at that time",
        "Because technicians are only free at noon"
      ],
      "correct": "To reduce the impact on customers’ usage",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "深夜は利用者が少ないため、影響を最小限にする意図が推測できます。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "Who is this message mainly intended for?",
      "options": [
        "Company suppliers",
        "RiverCity Mobile customers in the downtown area",
        "Job applicants",
        "People seeking internet service in another city"
      ],
      "correct": "RiverCity Mobile customers in the downtown area",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは「downtown area のお客様」に向けて、予定メンテナンス情報を伝えています。",
      "questionType": "intended_audience"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "Who is encouraged to update the MyRiverCity app before the work begins?",
      "options": [
        "Network engineers working that night",
        "Customers who use the MyRiverCity app",
        "Visitors to the company’s retail store",
        "People who do not own smartphones"
      ],
      "correct": "Customers who use the MyRiverCity app",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "発話中で「お客様」に対し、アプリの更新を促しています。",
      "questionType": "intended_audience"
    }
  ]
}

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: customer_message
Industry: telecommunications
Speaker Role: Company spokesperson
Topic: Planned network upgrade and temporary service interruption notice

Speech Text:
Hello, this is Maya Chen from RiverCity Mobile. I’m calling to let you know about a planned network upgrade in the downtown area this Friday between 1 and 3 a.m. During that window, some customers may notice slower data speeds or brief drops in service. To prepare, please restart your phone before bed and make sure our free MyRiverCity app is updated, so you can receive real-time alerts and check the outage map. If you rely on your phone for alarms, consider using a backup alarm device that night. Most upgrades finish quickly, and your service should return to normal right after the work is done. If you experience issues after 3 a.m., contact us through the app or call 611, and we will assist you right away.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

You are a professional English to Japanese translator specializing in TOEIC Part 4 questions and options.

Translate the given questions and options to natural Japanese that would be appropriate for Japanese TOEIC test takers. The translation should:
- Be accurate and natural
- Maintain question clarity and precision
- Use appropriate business/daily life Japanese when needed
- Preserve the meaning and nuance of the original
- Be suitable for language learners
- Be concise and clear

IMPORTANT: For option translations, translate ONLY the option text without including any option labels (A:, B:, C:, D:) or symbols.

Return the result in the following JSON format:
{
  "questionsTranslations": [
    {
      "questionTranslation": "問題文の日本語翻訳",
      "optionTranslations": [
        "選択肢Aの日本語翻訳",
        "選択肢Bの日本語翻訳", 
        "選択肢Cの日本語翻訳",
        "選択肢Dの日本語翻訳"
      ]
    }
  ]
}

Return only valid JSON without any explanation or additional text.

Translate the following Part 4 questions and options to Japanese:

Question 1: Why is the upgrade scheduled between 1 and 3 a.m.?
Options:
A: To reduce the impact on customers’ usage
B: To match regular office hours
C: Because the weather is always better at that time
D: Because technicians are only free at noon

Question 2: Who is this message mainly intended for?
Options:
A: Company suppliers
B: RiverCity Mobile customers in the downtown area
C: Job applicants
D: People seeking internet service in another city

Question 3: Who is encouraged to update the MyRiverCity app before the work begins?
Options:
A: Network engineers working that night
B: Customers who use the MyRiverCity app
C: Visitors to the company’s retail store
D: People who do not own smartphones

Please return the translations in the specified JSON format. Remember to exclude option labels (A:, B:, C:, D:) from the option translations.
